title: agrostis alba subsp. scabrida
intro: Agrostis alba subsp. scabrida, also known as rough bent grass, is a subspecies of grass belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties, which can help in treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and preventing infections. The health benefits of Agrostis alba subsp. scabrida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the grass is often made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness.
